name: picasso-scheduling-lib
description: Shared scheduling-core logic library (sub-phase C). Pure-logic modules consumed by the BSH conversational flow + the C8 booking-commit Lambda via relative require + esbuild bundling — this package is library code, it has no own deployment. Each parallel workstream (C4 availability / C5 routing / C7 slots / C9 state machine / D1a tokens) ADDS one module here + its __tests__ file and NEVER edits this package.json (per scheduling/docs/PARALLEL_WORKSTREAMS.md disjoint-ownership rule). Runtime deps below are pre-populated by the integrator (pre-launch §4.0 step 2) so no workstream needs to touch them.
